title: Copper Update for TimePlay
body:
# Important!
Don't look for much meaning in this fashion. It was made at the request of one person for my minecraft server. Maybe this mod will appeal to copper lovers.

# How does the mod work?
In this mod, I added the ability for copper to oxidize. Except for the doors and hatches. Stonecutter will help to change the oxidation stage of the latter.

The removal of oxidation from the blocks takes place using Stonecutter. You can't do it with an axe.

The creation of all blocks in this mod is the same as in the original.

You can create a wax version of the block using only the Crafting Table.

![Update Prewiew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/16tMdGzy/images/1b3b2cfc92793c443b83a601371dd5178142592f.png)
